Hero.title: Simplify your thinking.
Hero.subtitle: Build systems.
Hero.body: I design AI-powered revenue systems for agencies and B2B service businesses — so founders can focus on the work only they can do. Based in Paris. Founder of <kaav>KaavOps</kaav> and <simine>Simine Paris</simine>.

Problem.label: The Problem
Problem.headline: Most service businesses are built around their founders.
Problem.subheadline: Your pipeline works because you work it. Your delivery happens because you oversee it. You are the engine, but also the bottleneck.

points.bottleneck: Founders spend 60% of their time on repetitive tasks.
points.scaling: Revenue plateaus because there are only so many hours in your day.
points.freedom: If you stop working, the system stops growing.

HomeServices.label: — What I do
HomeServices.headline: I build the systems you're running manually.
HomeServices.subheadline: Through KaavOps, I design and deploy AI-powered revenue infrastructure for agencies and B2B service providers who have found product-market fit and need infrastructure to match.

lead-gen.title: Lead generation
lead-gen.description: Automated outreach and qualification systems that surface the right prospects continuously — without you managing the process.

onboarding.title: Client onboarding
onboarding.description: Structured workflows that take a new client from signed to operational without requiring your personal attention at each step.

retention.title: Follow-up & retention
retention.description: Sequences that keep clients engaged, surface upsell moments, and handle renewals before they become conversations you have to remember.

KaavOpsHome.label: — KaavOps
KaavOpsHome.tagline: AI automation for agencies and B2B service providers.
KaavOpsHome.description: We work with founders who have already found product-market fit and need infrastructure to match their ambition. The audit takes one week. The systems run for years.

revenue.title: Building Revenue Systems with AI — What Actually Works
revenue.excerpt: Most AI automation projects fail at the same point: the handoff between systems. Here is what I have learned building revenue infrastructure for service businesses.

art.title: Why Iranian Contemporary Art Belongs at the Center of European Conversation
art.excerpt: Iranian artists are producing some of the most urgent work being made today. The question is not whether Europe is ready — it is whether we have the courage to present it properly.

tools.title: The Tools I Use to Run Two Businesses Solo
tools.excerpt: A straightforward account of the stack — n8n, Claude Code, ClickUp, and a few others — and why each one earned its place.

Newsletter.label: — Newsletter
Newsletter.headline: If your business feels harder than it should:
Newsletter.description: I write about systems thinking, AI automation, and building businesses that don't depend on you being available. No frequency promises — only when I have something useful to say.

Footer.tagline: Paris — AI Automation Systems for Service Providers.

Metadata.title: Services
Metadata.description: KaavOps designs AI-powered revenue systems for agencies and B2B service providers across France and Europe.

Header.label: — KaavOps
Header.title: Revenue systems that run without you.
Header.description: We design and deploy AI-powered automation infrastructure for agencies and B2B service providers across France and Europe. The audit takes one week. The systems run for years.

lead-gen.description: Automated outreach and qualification that runs continuously — finding, contacting, and filtering prospects without manual effort.

onboarding.description: Structured workflows that take a new client from signed to operational without requiring your personal attention at each step.

retention.description: Sequences that keep clients engaged, surface upsell moments, and handle renewals before they become conversations you have to remember.

reporting.description: Dashboards and automated summaries that give you the numbers you need without pulling them yourself.

01.label: Automation audit
01.body: We map every manual, founder-dependent process in your revenue operations. One week. Deliverable: a clear picture of what can be automated, what the impact would be, and what we would build.

02.label: System design
02.body: We design the infrastructure — the workflows, connections, and logic — before touching any tools. Good automation is an architecture problem first.

03.label: Build & deploy
03.body: We build in n8n, connected to your existing CRM, email, and calendar. Everything is documented. You own the systems entirely — no dependency on us to keep them running.

04.label: Ongoing support
04.body: Available for maintenance, expansions, and new system builds as your business grows. No retainer required to start.

Fit.label: — Fit
Fit.title: Who this is for
Fit.body1: Agencies and B2B service businesses that have found product-market fit and need infrastructure to match their ambition. You are already generating revenue. The problem is that the revenue process depends on you.
Fit.body2: We work in France and Europe, in English and French. Typical client profile: 5–50 person agency or consultancy, €500k–€5M ARR, founder-led sales with a team that needs the founder out of every deal.
Fit.body3: If you are at an earlier stage and want to build clean infrastructure from the start, we can talk about that too.

Metadata.title: About — Reza Ghobady
Metadata.description: I build things that run without me. Founder of KaavOps and Simine Paris.

Header.label: — About
Header.title: I build things that run without me.
Header.description: At KaavOps, I design AI-powered revenue systems for agencies and B2B service providers. At Simine Paris, I run a contemporary art gallery focused on Iranian artists. I work solo, move deliberately, and prefer depth over speed.

Story.label: — Story
Story.title: How I got here
Story.body1: Iranian roots, Paris life. I have been based in France long enough for it to be home, and connected to Iran closely enough for it to remain essential.
Story.body2: My background is in business and the art world, not engineering. I am self-taught in technology — which means I approach software with a strong preference for clarity over cleverness.
Story.body3: KaavOps came from watching founders in my network run businesses that depended entirely on them. I kept thinking: this is an infrastructure problem.
Story.body4: Simine Paris came from a different kind of gap — the near-absence of serious engagement with Iranian contemporary art in European gallery culture. We are building presence.

complexity.title: Complexity is usually a design failure.
complexity.desc: When a business feels hard to run, the problem is almost never effort. It is architecture.

depth.title: Depth over speed, always.
depth.desc: I would rather understand a problem completely than ship a solution quickly that solves the wrong thing.

solo.title: Solo is a legitimate operating model.
solo.desc: Both businesses run without employees. It forces clarity about what actually matters and what is just noise.

context.title: Context is not a footnote.
context.desc: The difference between a useful system and a profitable one is usually a design problem, not a technology problem.

Now.label: — Now
Now.title: What I'm working on
Now.body: Building the v2 onboarding system for KaavOps. Preparing the next Simine Paris exhibition for autumn 2026. Writing this site using Claude Code.

Contact.label: — Let's talk
Contact.title: If any of this sounds relevant to what you're building:
Contact.body: I am fluent in French and English. I work across art, private equity, food, and fashion networks — contexts that do not usually talk to each other.

Moi.heroSubtitle: I build AI-powered revenue systems for agencies and B2B businesses.
